issues.title: Migration check incomplete — makemigrations --check does not verify applied state
issues.attack: makemigrations --check only verifies model-migration file match, not DB schema sync. Design spec requires no unapplied migrations.

issues.title: Consultant project detail/edit direct-URL bypass not verified
issues.attack: project_detail, project_update, and tab views use organization=org without assigned_consultants check. Consultant can access any org project via UUID.
issues.response: Valid gap. Adding checklist items for consultant unassigned project access. Will likely fail and need follow-up fix.

issues.title: Reference management owner access not verified
issues.attack: Reference write endpoints use @staff_member_required, not @role_required('owner'). Non-staff owner sees menu but gets 403.
issues.response: Explicit design decision in t05 impl-plan: 'Write views keep existing @staff_member_required (staff→role 전환은 별도 작업)'. Not in t03-t09 scope. Downgraded to MINOR.

issues.title: Step 10 sidebar '프로젝트 승인' not reproducible without setup data
issues.attack: Sidebar menu is conditional on pending_approval_count > 0. Checklist never creates the precondition.
issues.response: Adding precondition: create pending approval project before checking sidebar label.

issues.title: Task 9 empty-state CTAs are not verified
issues.attack: Manual checklist never exercises role-based empty-state CTAs from Task 9. Design spec 1.5 requires these.
issues.response: Adding checklist items for owner/consultant empty-state CTAs on dashboard, project list, client list.

issues.title: No negative-path testing for invite codes
issues.attack: Only valid codes tested. Invalid, expired, used codes not checked. Design spec defines negative path behavior.
issues.response: Downgraded to MINOR (automated tests cover this). Adding one negative-path checklist item.

issues.title: No unauthenticated user access testing
issues.attack: All checklist items assume logged-in state. No verification of unauthenticated access to protected pages.
issues.response: All views use @login_required. Automated tests cover this. Manual verification adds no value.

issues.title: No test coverage verification
issues.attack: Test suite runs without coverage check. Critical RBAC paths could be untested.
issues.response: Project has no coverage baseline. Coverage tooling is a project-level concern, not a verification checklist item. Each task wrote its own tests.

issues.title: No state transition lifecycle verification
issues.attack: States checked in isolation, not re-entry behavior (e.g., approved user revisiting pending page).
issues.response: Adding state transition checks for approved/rejected users accessing old state URLs.
